name: Medical Emergency Response Protocol

steps.action: Assess the patient — check responsiveness, breathing, and pulse
constraints: Do not move patient if spinal injury suspected

steps.action: Call for emergency medical services and provide location details
constraints: Verify before broadcast — confirm address and patient condition

steps.action: Clear the area — secure a 3-meter perimeter around the patient
constraints: Allow only trained responders within perimeter

steps.action: Retrieve AED and first aid kit from emergency station
constraints: Check AED battery status before use
Do not move patient without medical guidance
